details.productUrlName: Riders of the Mark Extended Art

customAttributes.description:
This spell costs 1 less to cast for each Human you control.
Trample, haste
At the beginning of your end step, if Riders of the Mark attacked this turn, return it to its owner's hand. If you do, create a number of 1/1 white Human Soldier creature tokens equal to its toughness.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/3/2023. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
